en: Jesus looked up and saw the rich putting their gifts into the offering box,
zh: 耶穌抬眼看見有錢的人把奉獻投入奉獻箱。

en: and he saw a poor widow put in two small copper coins.
zh: 他又看見一個窮寡婦，投入兩個小錢，

en: And he said, "Truly, I tell you, this poor widow has put in more than all of them.
zh: 就說：“我實在告訴你們，這個窮寡婦所投的，比眾人投的更多。

en: For they all contributed out of their abundance, but she out of her poverty put in all she had to live on."
zh: 因為這些人都是把自己剩餘的投進去作奉獻，這寡婦是自己不足，卻把所有養生的都投進去了。”

en: And while some were speaking of the temple, how it was adorned with noble stones and offerings, he said,
zh: 有人在談論聖殿，是用美麗的石頭和供物裝飾的。耶穌說：

en: "As for these things that you see, the days will come when there will not be left here one stone upon another that will not be thrown down."
zh: “你們看見的這些，到了日子，必沒有一塊石頭留在另一塊石頭上面，每一塊都要拆下來。”

en: And they asked him, "Teacher, when will these things be, and what will be the sign when these things are about to take place?"
zh: 那些人問他：“老師，甚麼時候會有這些事呢？這些事要發生的時候，有甚麼預兆呢？”

en: And he said, "See that you are not led astray. For many will come in my name, saying, 'I am he!' and, 'The time is at hand!' Do not go after them.
zh: 他說：“你們要小心，不要被人迷惑。因為有許多人要來，假冒我的名說：‘我就是基督’，又說：‘時候近了。’你們不要跟從這些人。

en: And when you hear of wars and tumults, do not be terrified, for these things must first take place, but the end will not be at once."
zh: 你們要聽見戰亂和暴動，但不要驚慌，因為這些事是必先發生的，不過結局卻不會立刻就到。”

en: Then he said to them, "Nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom.
zh: 過了一會兒，耶穌又對他們說：“一個民族要起來攻打另一個民族，一個國家要起來攻打另一個國家。

en: There will be great earthquakes, and in various places famines and pestilences. And there will be terrors and great signs from heaven.
zh: 必有大地震，到處有饑荒和瘟疫，天上必有又恐怖又巨大的預兆。

en: But before all this they will lay their hands on you and persecute you, delivering you up to the synagogues and prisons, and you will be brought before kings and governors for my name's sake.
zh: 但在這一切以先，人必為我的名，下手拘捕、迫害你們，把你們交給會堂，下在監裡，甚至押到君王和總督面前，

en: This will be your opportunity to bear witness.
zh: 結果卻成了你們見證的機會。

en: Settle it therefore in your minds not to meditate beforehand how to answer,
zh: 所以，你們應當心裡鎮定，用不著預先思慮怎樣申辯。

en: for I will give you a mouth and wisdom, which none of your adversaries will be able to withstand or contradict.
zh: 因為我必賜給你們口才、智慧，是你們所有的敵人不能抵抗，也不能駁倒的。

en: You will be delivered up even by parents and brothers and relatives and friends, and some of you they will put to death.
zh: 你們也會被父母、弟兄、親戚、朋友出賣，他們又要害死你們一些人。

en: You will be hated by all for my name's sake.
zh: 你們要因我的名，被眾人恨惡，

en: But not a hair of your head will perish.
zh: 然而連你們的一根頭髮，也必不失落。

en: By your endurance you will gain your lives.
zh: 你們要以堅忍的心志，贏取自己的靈魂。

en: "But when you see Jerusalem surrounded by armies, then know that its desolation has come near.
zh: “當你們看見耶路撒冷被軍隊圍困的時候，就知道它荒涼的日子近了。

en: Then let those who are in Judea flee to the mountains, and let those who are inside the city depart, and let not those who are out in the country enter it,
zh: 那時，住在猶太的，應該逃到山上；住在城裡的，要離開；住在鄉下的，不要進城。

en: for these are days of vengeance, to fulfill all that is written.
zh: 因為這是報仇的日子，使經上的一切話都得應驗。

en: Alas for women who are pregnant and for those who are nursing infants in those days! For there will be great distress upon the earth and wrath against this people.
zh: 當那些日子，懷孕的和乳養孩子的有禍了！因為大災難要臨到這地，烈怒要臨到這民。

en: They will fall by the edge of the sword and be led captive among all nations, and Jerusalem will be trampled underfoot by the Gentiles, until the times of the Gentiles are fulfilled.
zh: 他們將倒在刀下，被擄到各國，耶路撒冷必被外族人踐踏，直到外族人的日期滿足。

en: "And there will be signs in sun and moon and stars, and on the earth distress of nations in perplexity because of the roaring of the sea and the waves,
zh: “日月星辰將有異兆；在地上，各國也要因著海洋波濤的咆哮而困苦不安。

en: people fainting with fear and with foreboding of what is coming on the world. For the powers of the heavens will be shaken.
zh: 天上的萬象震動，人因為等待即將臨到世界的事，都嚇昏了。

en: And then they will see the Son of Man coming in a cloud with power and great glory.
zh: 那時，他們要看見人子，帶著能力，滿有榮耀，駕著雲降臨。

en: Now when these things begin to take place, straighten up and raise your heads, because your redemption is drawing near."
zh: 一有這些事，你們就當挺身昂首，因為你們的救贖近了。”

en: And he told them a parable: "Look at the fig tree, and all the trees.
zh: 耶穌又給他們講了一個比喻：“你們看看無花果樹和各樣的樹。

en: As soon as they come out in leaf, you see for yourselves and know that the summer is already near.
zh: 它們甚麼時候發芽，你們看見了，就知道夏天近了。

en: So also, when you see these things taking place, you know that the kingdom of God is near.
zh: 同樣，你們甚麼時候看見這些事發生，也應該知道 神的國近了。

en: Truly, I say to you, this generation will not pass away until all has taken place.
zh: 我實在告訴你們，這一切都必定發生，然後這世代才會過去。

en: Heaven and earth will pass away, but my words will not pass away.
zh: 天地都過去，但我的話決不會廢去。

en: "But watch yourselves lest your hearts be weighed down with dissipation and drunkenness and cares of this life, and that day come upon you suddenly like a trap.
zh: “你們應當自己小心，免得在貪食醉酒和生活的掛慮壓住你們的心的時候，那日子突然臨到你們，

en: For it will come upon all who dwell on the face of the whole earth.
zh: 正如網羅臨到全地的所有居民。

en: But stay awake at all times, praying that you may have strength to escape all these things that are going to take place, and to stand before the Son of Man."
zh: 你們要時刻警醒，常常祈求，好讓你們能逃避這一切要發生的事，可以站在人子面前。”

en: And every day he was teaching in the temple, but at night he went out and lodged on the mount called Olivet.
zh: 耶穌白天在殿裡教導人，晚上就到橄欖山上去過夜。

en: And early in the morning all the people came to him in the temple to hear him.
zh: 群眾清早起來上聖殿，到他那裡要聽他講道。
